div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:11px; padding:10mm 12mm; color:#222;

td.style: width:25%; vertical-align:bottom;
width:50%; text-align:center; vertical-align:top;

span.style: background-color:#40a4d5; color:white; font-weight:bold; font-size:18px; padding:7px 12px 6px 12px; letter-spacing:1px; display:inline-block; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;

td.style: width:25%; text-align:right; vertical-align:bottom;

img.style: height:70px; width:70px; object-fit:cover; border:1px solid #ccc; display:inline-block; max-width:100%;

div.p: I Undertake to be bound by all such conditions, obligations and responsibilities as printed overleaf in this respect, made there under.

div.style: color:#40a4d5; font-weight:bold; font-size:12px; padding:4px 0px; letter-spacing:.3px; margin-bottom:0;

td.style: width:15%; background:#edf7fc; padding:6px 8px; font-weight:bold; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
width:35%; background:#ffffff; padding:6px 8px; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
width:15%; background:#edf7fc; padding:6px 8px; font-weight:bold; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
width:35%; background:#ffffff; padding:6px 8px; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#edf7fc; padding:6px 8px; font-weight:bold; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#ffffff; padding:6px 8px; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#edf7fc; padding:6px 8px; font-weight:bold; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#ffffff; padding:6px 8px; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#edf7fc; padding:6px 8px; font-weight:bold; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;
background:#ffffff; padding:6px 8px; border-top:none; border-left:none; border-right:none; border-bottom:1px solid #d7e9f3;

span.t-esc: ', '.join(filter(None, [ file.membership_id.street, file.membership_id.street2, file.membership_id.city, file.membership_id.state_id.name if file.membership_id.state_id else '', file.membership_id.zip, file.membership_id.country_id.name if file.membership_id.country_id else '' ]))

div.style: color:#40a4d5; font-weight:bold; font-size:12px; padding:4px 0px; letter-spacing:.3px; margin-bottom:0;

th.style: padding:6px; text-align:left; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2; font-weight:bold;
padding:6px; text-align:left; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2; font-weight:bold;
padding:6px; text-align:left; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2; font-weight:bold;
padding:6px; text-align:left; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2; font-weight:bold;

td.style: padding:6px; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2;
padding:6px; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2;
padding:6px; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2;
padding:6px; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #ddebf2;
padding:7px; border:none;

tr.td: No next of kin on record

div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:11px; padding:10mm 12mm; color:#222;

td.style: width:25%; vertical-align:top;
width:50%; text-align:center; vertical-align:top;

span.style: background-color:#40a4d5; color:white; font-weight:bold; font-size:18px; padding:7px 12px 6px 12px; letter-spacing:1px; display:inline-block; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;

td.style: width:25%; text-align:right; vertical-align:bottom;

img.style: height:70px; width:70px; object-fit:cover; border:1px solid #ccc; display:inline-block; max-width:100%;

div.style: color:#40a4d5; font-weight:bold; font-size:12px; padding:4px 0px; letter-spacing:.3px; margin-bottom:0;
